overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a vibrant neon-lit night market in Night City. The player traverses covered walkways with red paper lanterns, open plazas with digital billboards, and approaches the Kabayan Foods entrance before turning into a cyan-lit market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian dining street with red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered walkway following pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the right side of the path
strings of red paper lanterns hanging overhead across the street
orange neon sign for Cheezus restaurant mounted on the building facade
metal tables and chairs with patrons seated outside the restaurant
large teal-colored rectangular planters with vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered pedestrian street decorated with hanging red paper lanterns. The Cheezus restaurant with outdoor seating is visible on the left, while construction barriers line the right side. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with digital billboards and benches

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions to open plaza with large digital billboards
moving from shadow into area illuminated by large red digital billboard

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing by benches and approaching a food cart

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench smoking

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying red holographic hand symbol advertisement
modern concrete public benches arranged along the walkway
food vendor cart with colorful rainbow umbrella
tall futuristic apartment building rising in the background

segments.scene_description: After a fade transition, the scene opens into an urban plaza featuring large digital billboards displaying red holographic advertisements. Concrete benches line the walkway where people sit and smoke, and a food cart with a colorful umbrella appears ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to Kabayan Foods entrance

events.description: entering narrow corridor approaching the Kabayan Foods neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow passage toward the illuminated entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gold jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large bright red neon sign reading 'Kabayan Foods' hanging over entrance
white cylindrical paper lanterns hanging in a row overhead
futuristic automated vending machine with glowing interface
stackable white plastic chairs arranged near the wall
metal security shutter gate behind the food counter

segments.scene_description: Walking down a narrow corridor toward the bright red 'Kabayan Foods' neon sign. White paper lanterns hang overhead, and the area becomes more enclosed with vending machines on the right and plastic chairs on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open food court with cyan neon lighting

events.description: turning right at the Kabayan Foods entrance into a wider market area

agents.ego_description: turning right at the end of the corridor and entering the open market space

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue shirt standing near the food stall

entered.detail: food stall illuminated with bright cyan and blue neon lighting
vertical cyan neon tube lights mounted on the back wall
temporary canopies and awnings over market stalls
large industrial storage containers and equipment

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the end of the corridor into a spacious open-air food court illuminated by cyan and blue neon lights. Multiple food stalls with vendors are visible, and the crowd density increases as the camera moves through the market area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant night market, transitioning from a lantern-lit pedestrian street into a sprawling, neon-drenched food court. It begins by moving through a semi-covered walkway adorned with red paper lanterns, passing the outdoor seating of Cheezus and construction barriers amidst a steady flow of pedestrians. As the path opens into an urban plaza, the environment shifts toward a wide expanse of concrete benches and large red holographic billboards before narrowing again into a corridor. The camera then pushes toward the bright red neon sign of Kabayan Foods, passing white lanterns and vending machines in an increasingly enclosed space. Finally, the view turns right into a spacious open-air market, where the lighting transforms into vivid cyan and blue hues as the camera weaves through a dense crowd of food stalls and vendors.
